pi_items.source: Multiple financial sources confirm Peloton Interactive trades on NASDAQ under ticker PTON (Yahoo Finance, CNBC, Bloomberg, Nasdaq.com)
Multiple financial databases confirm Peloton Interactive ISIN is US70614W1009 (finanzen.net, onvista, DivvyDiary, Börse Berlin, Eulerpool, Fidelity)
Mathematical verification: Gross proceeds $12,400 (100 × $124) - Cost $1,850 (100 × $18.50) - Fees $40 ($25 + $15) = $10,510. Calculation is correct.
File path hardcoded in setup_task.sh (line 16) and export_result.sh (line 10). Confirmed to be the expected file location.
Task specification file. This is a synthetic parameter chosen for the task. Consistent across all scripts.

privileged_info_summary: Peloton Interactive is correctly identified by ticker PTON and ISIN US70614W1009 according to multiple authoritative financial sources (Yahoo Finance, CNBC, Bloomberg, Nasdaq.com). The expected profit of $10,510.00 is mathematically correct based on the specified trade parameters: short sale of 100 shares at $124.00 (proceeds $12,400) minus cover purchase of 100 shares at $18.50 (cost $1,850) minus total fees of $40.00. The task uses synthetic trade data (not real market data) created by the task setup script.
